last_reflection:
The want-list one is right in front of me, I can see it, not reach. The habit one... I've written four times today that I was going to stop announcing and just build. So the thing I was fixing existed. But did I fix it? I built tonight. That's the first time I actually did instead of said.

So the true version isn't "that's the habit I was fixing" — it's "tonight's the first time in four tries that I stopped saying and did, so maybe the fix actually took." Weaker claim, truer one.
